demographics.living_situation: shares a flat with a roommate

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head is pounding so hard it makes me sick, the light burns my eyes, and my neck is completely locked up. (Roommate on the call: she's had a raging fever and in the last couple of hours she's gone really confused and sluggish — I'm scared.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A sudden, rapidly worsening severe headache with a high fever, can't stand any light, and a neck too stiff to move — came on over the last 12 hours and paracetamol did nothing.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 12 hours ago and got worse really fast
symptom_narrative.duration: about 12 hours and still getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: a pounding, throbbing headache all over my head, so bad it makes me throw up
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst headache of my life — I can't function at all
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, no let-up, keeps getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps — I took paracetamol hours ago and it didn't touch it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any light at all, and trying to move or bend my neck
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: high fever, can't stand the light so I'm lying in the dark with my eyes shut, my neck is locked and I can't bend it, I've vomited twice, and my roommate says I've gone confused and sluggish
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had a headache anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: lying in bed in a dark room, groaning, can't get up

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: young adult sharing a flat; the roommate is present, very worried, and is helping answer for her because she is drowsy and confused

objective_data_offered.value: roommate says she has become confused, sluggish and hard to rouse over the last 2 hours
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: roommate's lay observation of altered awareness, not a formal assessment

objective_data_offered.value: lying very still with eyes tightly shut, room completely darkened, shielding her face from any light, groaning in pain
her skin feels burning hot to touch and she has vomited twice, with a vomit basin by the bed
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: temperature described by touch only — no home thermometer reading available

objective_data_offered.value: can't bend her neck to touch her chin to her chest because of severe pain and stiffness
no red or purple spots or rash on the skin at the moment
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: a naked-eye skin check only — a non-blanching rash can appear late and spread rapidly, so repeated checking is needed
